properties.description: Correlates DLP alerts with a subsequent burst of file downloads by the same user within 1 hour (potential exfiltration pattern). Requires Defender XDR CloudAppEvents.
properties.query:
let dlp = union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend ProductName = tostring(column_ifexists('ProductName', ''))
| extend Entities = tostring(column_ifexists('Entities', ''))
| extend AlertName = tostring(column_ifexists('AlertName', ''))
| where ProductName has 'Microsoft Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
| extend user = tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].Name)
| project dlpTime=TimeGenerated, user, AlertName;
let downloads = union isfuzzy=true CloudAppEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend ActionType = tostring(column_ifexists('ActionType', ''))
| extend AccountUpn = tostring(column_ifexists('AccountUpn', ''))
| extend AccountDisplayName = tostring(column_ifexists('AccountDisplayName', ''))
| where ActionType in ('FileDownloaded','FileSyncDownloadedFull')
| summarize downloadCount=count(), firstDownload=min(TimeGenerated) by AccountDisplayName, AccountUpn;
dlp
| join kind=inner downloads on $left.user == $right.AccountUpn
| where downloadCount >= 20
| where firstDownload between (dlpTime .. dlpTime + 1h)
| project dlpTime, user, AlertName, downloadCount, firstDownload
